author: oxilldat
description: Emotion diary plugin for Obsidian - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: oxilldat
manifest.description: Emotion diary with analytics in daily notes
manifest.name: Emotion Book

name: Emotion Book

releases.author: oxilldat
releases.description:
- Numeric emotion values are now written to frontmatter for Dataview integration.
- Added localization support for English and Russian.
- Fixed CSS styles for proper text contrast on light and dark Obsidian themes.
